criteria.reason: tools/axxon_mcp_web_api.py defines AxxonMcpWebApi with all six web_api tools (WEB_API_TOOL_NAMES) and injectable client_factory/config_factory/socket_factory. web_api_connect_axxon_profile rejects non-env ('gap'), builds config lazily via config_factory, returns mode='read' and public_config_summary (no raw password). Unit test test_connect_env_only_lazy_and_redacts_secrets asserts 'password' not in summary and password_present true; passes.

tools/axxon_mcp_client_api.py defines AxxonMcpClientApi with the three client_api tools. client_api_preflight uses socket_probe (read-only socket.create_connection in a context manager, no payload) returning sanitized dicts with reachable booleans + fixture_gap, no secrets. list_client_api_operations returns 8 _OPERATIONS each status='fixture-needed' with no wire/probe call. test_operations_all_fixture_needed_no_wire asserts inst._probed == [] and all fixture-needed; test_preflight_never_mutates confirms no executed op. Passes.

web_events_probe is a single handshake then close. web_events_sample caps frames via max(1, min(max_frames, MAX_EVENT_FRAMES=8)) and wall-clock via MAX_EVENT_SECONDS=5.0 deadline; returns frames/payload_bytes_seen/opcode_tallies (counts only) and never raw payload. _drain_frames returns (opcode, length) tuples only. Both reject paths not in KNOWN_EVENT_PATHS=('/events','/ws','/ws/events'). Tests: test_sample_caps_frames_and_returns_no_raw_bytes (asserts no 'hi'/'SECRET-ACCEPT-KEY' in output, frames<=2), test_sample_hard_cap_overrides_large_request (9999 requested -> <=8), test_probe_rejects_unknown_path / test_sample_rejects_unknown_path (assert no socket created). All pass.

embeddable_component_url builds http_url + '/embedded.html' with query (origin/mode/time/archivePane), rejects modes outside ('live','archive'), embeds no credentials (only camera origin + mode params), and returns a paste-ready <iframe> snippet. embeddable_component_commands returns the typed _COMMAND_CATALOG (init, reInit, 'live | archive', 'play | stop', setTime, setCamera) with the ISO 8601 note and doc source. Tests test_component_url_builds_iframe_src_no_credentials, test_component_url_rejects_bad_mode, test_component_commands_catalog_matches_doc pass.

tools/axxon_mcp_server.py: CAPABILITY_GROUPS['web_api'] and ['client_api'] (lines 77-78) with --enable-web-api/--enable-client-api flags. create_server has web_api/client_api params (151-152), enabled_groups tuple includes both (222), register_web_api_tools/register_client_api_tools defined (1638/1670) and invoked when not None (418-422). main() lazy-imports and constructs both, passing them as kwargs (3212-3280). Runtime check: 'web_api' True, 'client_api' True, len(CAPABILITY_GROUPS)=53. --help lists both flags. Server tests test_create_server_registers_web_api_tools_only_when_enabled, ..._client_api_..., and ..._reports_web_and_client_api_disabled_and_enabled all pass. Both groups are read-only/knowledge opt-in flags, no read-only-mode conflict.

tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_web_api.py (11 tests) covers connect+redaction, URL/command builders, WS probe/sample caps + no-raw-bytes + path allowlist via fake socket/handshake. tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_client_api.py (6 tests) covers connect+redaction, preflight read-only+sanitized+gap, no-mutation, and fixture-needed catalog. test_axxon_mcp_server.py adds 3 server-registration tests. `python3.12 -m unittest tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_web_api tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_client_api` -> Ran 17 tests OK.
`python3.12 -m unittest discover -s tools/tests` -> Ran 1176 tests ... OK, exit 0, no failures or errors. Matches evidence claim of 1176 (1156 prior + 20 new).

README.md line 21: '326 MCP tools across 53 capability groups in nine layers'; new 'Client / Web API' layer row (line 44) listing the seven new tools. docs/ALL_IN_ONE_VMS_API_ROADMAP.md: Current Numbers row 'Actual all-enabled MCP tools | 326'; 'HTTP, WebSocket, embeddable video' row notes web_api live-verified on port 80 and client_api preflight + fixture-needed; 'Layouts...client UI' row notes client_api preflight with port 8888 closed; backlog item 3 (line 160) reflects Phase 5 web_api live-reachable + client_api preflight/fixture-needed. Counts re-derived (321 server decorators + 5 delegated = 326).

python3.12 -m unittest tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_web_api tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_client_api  (Ran 17 tests, OK)
rg -n 'password|cookie|token' on both new modules  (only docstring/redaction mentions; no raw secret returned)
rg -n web/client wiring in axxon_mcp_server.py (CAPABILITY_GROUPS, params, register fns, main())
rg/Read of README.md and docs/ALL_IN_ONE_VMS_API_ROADMAP.md (326 tools / 53 groups, live vs preflight split)
python3.12 -m unittest tools.tests.test_axxon_mcp_server -v (3 web_api/client_api registration tests ok)
Read of tools/axxon_mcp_web_api.py, tools/axxon_mcp_client_api.py, and both new test files
notes: Independently verified against current code and freshly-run commands. All eight acceptance criteria PASS. Code inspection confirms: env-only lazy connect with public_config_summary redaction (no raw password), MAX_EVENT_FRAMES=8 / MAX_EVENT_SECONDS=5.0 caps with KNOWN_EVENT_PATHS allowlist, _drain_frames returns opcode/length metadata only (no raw payload bytes), embeddable URL embeds no credentials, and list_client_api_operations marks all 8 ops fixture-needed with no wire/socket call (test asserts inst._probed == []). Secret scan returns only docstring text. Server wiring complete. Docs reflect 326 tools / 53 groups with the honest web_api-live / client_api-preflight split. Offline unit suite (1176) + 17 new tests authoritative; optional live-stand evidence not required and not exercised. No stale problems.md present; none created (PASS).
